title: Judge didn't deny Trump request to attend son's graduation | Fact check
shortDescription: Judge Juan Merchan declined to decide if court will be called off that day, saying the decision depends on the speed of the trial.

title: A rough two days for Trump? Former president suffers setbacks at trial
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump was admonished by a New York judge and faced a series of other blows as his hush money trial unfolded early this week.

title: Senate rejects both impeachment articles against Alejandro Mayorkas
shortDescription: Democrats always planned to quickly dismiss the GOP-led charges in what both sides called a historic impeachment.

title: Trump challenges Biden to debate after dodging GOP rivals
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is calling on President Joe Biden to debate him, despite dodging similar challenges from his former Republican primary rivals.

title: Mike Johnson sets up showdown with right-wing lawmakers over Ukraine, Israel aid
shortDescription: House Speaker Mike Johnson is sticking by his foreign aid plan to in a move that is already inciting conservative fury at the speaker.

title: Alaska state rep: Civil rights law doesn't apply to trans kids
shortDescription: The Last Frontier is one step closer to approving legislation against trans girls participating in school sports.

title: Election recounts could be pervasive in Pa. under existing law
shortDescription: Critics of the commonwealth's easy-to-initiate recount process fear bad-faith efforts to delay electoral certification by the Dec. 11 deadline.

title: Donald Trump hush money trial Day 2 takeaways | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus, Biden's push for blue-collar voters, and what districts won by Trump could tell him. Another GOP lawmaker backs ousting of Speaker Mike Johnson.

title: Democrats win special elections to Michigan House, restore majority
shortDescription: In special elections in a pair of metro Detroit districts, Democratic victories could end the legislative gridlock resulting from a tied chamber.

title: President Biden moves to triple tariffs on Chinese steel and aluminum
shortDescription: Biden will announce to the United Steelworkers union in Pittsburgh that he's calling for hikes in Chinese steel and aluminum under Section 301.

title: WWIII? U.S. voters must weigh foreign affairs impact on 2024 election
shortDescription: Voters, activists and foreign policy experts say the U.S. becoming entangled in a larger global conflict is concerning but not top of mind – yet.

title: The southern border is top of mind for voters thousands of miles away
shortDescription: New Hampshire voters say immigration is their number one issue come November, part of a growing national anxiety, experts say.
